situational_context: Running comeback accelerating: 4 runs completed in 16 days (gap broken 2026-05-03 after 182 days). Run #4 today hit 5.0 km (43 min, avg HR 140, suffer 26) — exceeded the 3.5 km plan but HR stayed in Z2. Distance jump of +43% from Run #3 is aggressive for tissue at 103.8 kg; consolidation at 5 km is the priority before any further increase. Training status upgraded from Detraining to MAINTAINING — first time since comeback began. ACWR at 0.85 (safe zone). Primary modality remains e-bike/gravel commuting (~38 km round trip on sur-site days). Chronic load stable at 22.25 but still very far from historical peak (1.4%). VO2max running improved to 38.7 (+0.4). Weight trending down well: 103.8 kg (from 105.2 kg on Apr 25, -1.4 kg in 3 weeks). Sleep deteriorated to 6.66h 7d avg (was 7.23h) — monitoring. 2 sur-site days this week (Tue/Thu) with conditional gravel/ebike impact. HRV stable at 38, BALANCED. Vitamin D retest due ~July 2026.

plan_7d_ahead.type: Sur site — commute only (ebike or gravel)
Sur site — commute only (ebike or gravel) + Anniv Flore

recommendations.text: Consolidate at 5 km for Run #5 (May 23). Do NOT increase distance — the +43% jump from Run #3 to #4 needs tissue consolidation. Monitor for post-run pain in the next 24-48h (Achilles, patellar, tibial). If any localized pain >24h, skip Run #5 and substitute with easy cycling.
recommendations.measurable: Run #5 completed at ≤5 km with no post-run pain lasting >24h; avg HR ≤145 bpm

recommendations.text: Prioritize sleep recovery: 7d avg dropped to 6.66h (from 7.23h). Target ≥7h for the next 5 nights. Sleep is not yet at the alarm threshold (4 nights <6h) but the trend is negative and recovery capacity at 103.8 kg with running comeback needs adequate sleep for tissue remodeling.

Continue eccentric calf raises 3x/week — critical injury-prevention measure given body weight and Achilles risk profile during running comeback. Now more important than ever as distance has jumped to 5 km.
recommendations.measurable: ≥3 calf-raise sessions logged in the next 7 days

markers_to_watch.threshold: Any localized pain (Achilles, patellar, tibial, plantar) lasting >24h after Run #4 triggers cancellation of Run #5
markers_to_watch.reason: Run #4 exceeded plan by 43% in distance — tissue tolerance is unknown at 5 km after 182-day gap at 103.8 kg

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if drops below 6.5h or if ≥4 nights <6h in rolling 7 days
markers_to_watch.reason: Currently 6.66h and declining; inadequate sleep compromises tendon remodeling during running comeback

markers_to_watch.threshold: Monitor for >1.0 if gravel commutes add significant load this week
markers_to_watch.reason: ACWR just entered safe zone (0.85) — gravel commutes could spike it above 1.0, which is fine up to 1.3 but needs monitoring

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if rises >5 bpm above 50 bpm for 3+ consecutive days
markers_to_watch.reason: Stable at 50 bpm; elevation would indicate overload or illness
